name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Added

- Added UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence Action=CodeUsages for read-only syntax-based C# impact scans before risky API renames, deletes, and signature changes.
- CodeUsages finds target type references and member call sites across C# scripts, including method invocations, member access, conditional access, nameof(...), possible identifier references, and string-based callbacks such as SendMessage, Invoke, and StartCoroutine.
- Code usage results include script path/GUID/type, line/column, usage kind, confidence, symbol, containing code context, note, and preview line.
- Added aliases such as code_usages, caller_scan, callers, member_callers, and code_member_usages across BatchActions, Discover, ToolGuide, and DomainCatalog.

### Improved

- UniBridge_BatchActions now normalizes ScriptIntelligence CodeUsages action aliases plus IncludeSelfReferences, IncludeStringReferences, and MaxReferences parameter aliases.
- Script impact workflows now distinguish script asset GUID usage (Usages), serialized Unity member usage (MemberUsages), and C# source caller/type usage (CodeUsages).

### Previous Changes

- UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence Action=MemberUsages finds serialized UnityEvent, AnimationEvent, and serialized field references to a script member.
- UniBridge_AssetIntelligence and UniBridge_ScriptIntelligence provide bounded YAML reference locations for asset/script GUID usages.
- UniBridge_AssetIntelligence Action=Structure provides read-only prefab and already-loaded scene asset structure workflows.
- UniBridge_TypeSchema TypeIndex and TypeFingerprint provide compact loaded Unity type maps and cache fingerprints.
- UniBridge_BatchActions can append opt-in post-action console and editor-event diagnostics.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.15 recovers RefreshAssets connection loss caused by Unity import/domain reload.
